notes: Fix: first column text wrapping (option A — pure CSS, no HTML change). Two changes: (1) box-sizing: border-box on all .proj-table cells — was content-box, so 14+14=28px padding was ADDING to the 180px width letting text spill into 208px effective. Border-box clamps total to 180px, forcing text into the available 152px. (2) word-break: break-word on .proj-table tbody th (was 'normal' which doesn't break mid-word). Combined with overflow-wrap: anywhere, this guarantees text breaks even if a single word is too long for the column. Same treatment applied to the 'Item' header cell.
